upload.hero_title: Understand how you use Claude Code
upload.hero_sub: Just drop a folder. See where your tokens actually go.
upload.privacy_note: Your conversations never leave the browser
upload.find_folder_mac_2: Press Command+Shift+. to show hidden folders
upload.find_folder_mac_4: Drag the projects folder into the drop zone below
upload.find_folder_win_3: Drag the projects folder into the drop zone below
upload.or_click: or click to pick the projects folder
upload.wifi_proof: 🔒 Your data is never sent to a server. If you're unsure, turn off Wi-Fi before dropping — it still works.
upload.api_key_note: Stored in browser only. Never sent to a server.
upload.api_key_recommend: We recommend creating a dedicated key for ClaudeCoach.
upload.api_key_howto: How to create an API key →

dashboard.suggestions_ai_locked: Enter your API key to unlock AI suggestions
dashboard.tool_desc_mcp: Call external tools via MCP servers
dashboard.benchmark_intro: Anonymously benchmark your usage against other users' averages
dashboard.benchmark_disclosure: Only the 6 aggregate ratios + your period total cost (USD) are sent. Prompt text, code, project names and API keys never leave your browser.
dashboard.benchmark_share_intro: I compared my Claude Code usage with other ClaudeCoach users 📊
dashboard.no_data: No data. Drop a folder from the top page to start.
dashboard.share_hint_clipboard: Image copied to clipboard. Paste it (Ctrl+V) in the X composer
dashboard.share_hint_downloaded: Image downloaded. Attach it manually in the X composer
dashboard.share_modal_clipboard_body:
When the X composer opens,
press the keys below to paste the image
dashboard.share_modal_downloaded_body:
Attach the image manually in the X composer
(saved in your Downloads folder)
dashboard.share_text_profitable: I analyzed my Claude Code usage with ClaudeCoach: on the {plan} plan I used ${api} worth of API → saved ${saving} ✨
dashboard.share_text_unprofitable: I analyzed my Claude Code usage with ClaudeCoach: on the {plan} plan I only used ${api} of API value… need to use it more 💦
dashboard.share_text_api: I analyzed my Claude Code usage with ClaudeCoach: ${cost} on the API plan 📊

claudeMd.title: CLAUDE.md Checker
claudeMd.subtitle: Score your CLAUDE.md and find ways to trim wasted context tokens
claudeMd.drop_or_pick: Drop a file or click to pick
claudeMd.issue_line_count: Too many lines (100 or fewer recommended)
claudeMd.issue_cache_dynamic: Dynamic content at the top — hurts cache
claudeMd.improved_note: AI improvement (API key required — set it in the form above)
claudeMd.api_key_required: API key required. Enter it in the form above.

feedback.title: Feedback
feedback.subtitle: Thoughts, requests, bug reports — anything goes.
feedback.anonymous_note: No name or email required. Just type and close.
feedback.placeholder: e.g. The chart colors are hard to read / plan detection feels off / would love feature X ...
feedback.empty: No comments yet. Be the first.

suggestions.long_prompt_desc: Many of your prompts exceed 500 characters. Use bullet points to be concise and save tokens.
suggestions.clarification_desc: Short back-and-forth detected. Specify output format and constraints up front to reduce rounds.
suggestions.low_cache_desc: Put stable content at the top of CLAUDE.md to improve caching.
suggestions.opus_overuse_title: You could use a cheaper model
suggestions.opus_overuse_desc: Sonnet is enough for simpler tasks.
suggestions.long_session_desc: Long continuous sessions detected. Use /compact to improve efficiency.
suggestions.polite_desc: Phrases like 'please' and 'thank you' waste tokens. Be direct.
suggestions.bash_heavy_desc: Verbose commands like test runners, git log, and docker logs are dominating your Bash usage. Consider RTK (rtk-ai/rtk) — it compresses Bash output by 60-90%.
suggestions.ai_mode_detailed_desc: Stats + tool breakdown + top 5 costly turns + clarification samples (deeper, ~$0.02/run)
suggestions.ai_error_rate_limit: Rate limit reached. Try again in a moment.
suggestions.no_issues: No issues found in your usage patterns 👍
